name: io.github.Ataraxy-Labs/weave
description: Entity-level semantic merge coordination for multi-agent development. Uses tree-sitter to extract functions, classes, and methods from source code, providing MCP tools for entity claiming, conflict detection, and merge previews at the semantic level. 9 tools: weave_extract_entities, weave_claim_entity, weave_release_entity, weave_status, weave_who_is_editing, weave_potential_conflicts, weave_preview_merge, weave_agent_register, weave_agent_heartbeat.
